mapper.select: /** UsptEtcCareerDao.selectList */ select etc_career_id , member_id , career_nm , career_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CAREER_TYPE', career_type_cd) as career_type , bgnde , endde , cn , instt , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt , row_number() over (order by career_type_cd, bgnde, created_dt) as rn from uspt_etc_career where member_id = #{memberId}
